messages.content:
Answer: ram is not enough context to answer anything meaningful about this codebase.


From the repo map, this project is a workspace-aware business assistant with customer/admin/agent flows.


Core runtime path: sanitize → build workspace/customer context → route intent → apply policy → execute backend/tool → guard response.


Likely architecture split:


core/workspace.js → workspace isolation/config


setup/profileService.js → business profile source of truth


runtime/customerFlow.js → customer request pipeline


runtime/agentChain.js → orchestration/LLM/tool chain


gateway/customerRouter.js → intent routing




agents/support.yml defines a support agent:


skip_domain_gate: true → support likely bypasses domain filtering


one intent: support → tool support_faq


tool uses FAQ YAML + SQLite orders DB


escalation via trigger phrases + phone number
